danger_signals.meaning: Resource scarcity creates tactical vulnerability; must reach light sources

danger_signals.visual_form: Wire-frame 3D cutscene transition with target objective briefing
danger_signals.meaning: Escalation of threat level; major combat encounter imminent

safety_signals.meaning: Safe zone for weapon power recharge; strategic rest point

safety_signals.meaning: Temporary protection through dual-control vehicle with independent defenses

safety_signals.visual_form: Primary weapon visual indicator; unlimited ammunition mechanic
safety_signals.meaning: Constant defensive capability; no resource drain unlike special weapons

faction_indicators.color_identity: Not explicitly documented; inferred from protagonist exoskeleton design

Alien invader design language distinct from human technology
faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Multiple enemy types with variant sprites throughout levels
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Invading territory; multiple level-based strongholds requiring destruction

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Rahuna forces occupy level environments; player home planet under siege
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player must clear enemy forces and destroy strategic targets to regain territory

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Power-up collectibles scattered across levels; bright light sources limited and strategic
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player must manage weapon selection and movement to maintain energy reserves

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: High-detail sprite animation of exoskeleton and Indra motorcycle; polished graphical presentation
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player equipment performs complex multi-animation combat sequences; dual action mechanics (flight + riding)

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Wire-frame 3D cutscenes introduce each level with specific target objectives
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player advances only upon completing destruction objectives and defeating stage boss

environmental_storytelling.example: Each stage introduces via cutscene detailing specific target objective, establishing narrative context for level goals
Bright environmental areas signal safe recharge zones, communicating level design intent and tactical positioning
Rahuna invader visual distinctiveness establishes alien faction identity and occupying force presence
Indra motorcycle availability on select levels visualizes support infrastructure and tactical equipment deployment
Target objectives exist as concrete environmental elements requiring deliberate destruction, making mission progression visually explicit

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Fires pulse rifle continuously; deploys special weapons; manages jet pack duration
Forced landing required; cooldown period needed before re-engagement of flight capability
Moves and fires independently; can be entered by Ranger X for shield absorption and dual-control tactics
Patrol level environments; engage player with varied attack patterns; respawn across stages until objectives destroyed
Deploy flamethrower and homing attacks; drain power bar at accelerated rate vs. standard rifle
Disabled until player reaches bright light source for recharge; forces strategic positioning

notes: Ranger-X communicates world-state primarily through mechanical resource management (jet pack heat, weapon power) combined with explicit mission briefing cutscenes. The Rahuna invasion scenario is established through narrative cutscenes and enemy presence distribution. Visual communication emphasizes technological contrast: human exoskeleton and motorcycle designs are detailed and intricate (praised for animation quality), while alien Rahuna forces are visually distinct to establish occupying faction. Environmental storytelling relies on strategic placement of safe recharge zones (bright light areas) and target objectives. The game's 'polished' visual presentation (per developer notes on color subtlety and custom tools) reinforces protagonist capability and technological superiority narrative.
